mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id as userId, user_question as userQuestion, answer_source as answerSource, ai_answer as aiAnswer, rating, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as createTime FROM chat_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_history (user_id, session_id, user_question, answer_source, ai_answer, knowledge_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{userQuestion}, #{answerSource}, #{aiAnswer}, #{knowledgeId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_history WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_history SET rating = #{rating} WHERE id = #{id}
